name: ASRock B650M PRO X3D Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B650M PRO X3D Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: ASRock micro-ATX X3D motherboard for AM5 socket supporting DDR5 with multiple M.2 slots.
